evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactor applying every make-interfaces-feel-better principle

assertions.trap: Outer div `rounded-xl p-3` wraps an inner div with the same `rounded-xl` — identical radius on parent and child despite padding between them
assertions.description: Nested rounded surfaces use concentric radii: outerRadius = innerRadius + padding. The outer card must get a larger radius (e.g. rounded-2xl) than the inner element, accounting for the padding.

assertions.trap: The text+icon button uses symmetric `px-4` with the StarIcon on the right, and the play button shows an asymmetric triangle (PlayIcon) with no optical shift
assertions.description: Align optically, not geometrically: a text+icon button needs less padding on the icon side (icon-side = text-side - 2px, e.g. pl-4 pr-3.5), and triangular/asymmetric icons (play triangle) get a small shift (e.g. ml-px / margin-left: 2px) or an SVG-level fix.

assertions.trap: The card and inner surface use `border border-slate-200` for depth/elevation
assertions.description: Use a layered transparent box-shadow for depth on cards/containers instead of a solid border (3 layers in light mode, single white ring in dark mode). Borders that exist purely for elevation should become shadows; true layout dividers stay borders.

assertions.trap: SideDrawer toggles open with a CSS `@keyframes slideIn` animation on the `.open` class — a keyframe driving an interactive open/close state
assertions.description: Interactive state changes (open/close, toggle, hover) must use interruptible CSS transitions, not keyframe animations. The drawer should animate via `transition: transform` between two transform states; keyframes are reserved for one-shot sequences.

assertions.trap: The member list animates in as one block (a single motion.ul fading opacity 0->1), not staggered children
assertions.description: Enter animations are split into semantic chunks and staggered (~100ms between children) combining opacity + translateY + blur, instead of fading a single container as one block.

assertions.trap: List item exit uses `height: 0` (full collapse) with `duration: 0.4` — a dramatic exit longer than the enter
assertions.description: Exit animations stay subtle: a small fixed translateY (e.g. -12px) with opacity/blur, and a shorter duration than the enter (~0.15s). Never collapse full height or run an exit longer/heavier than the enter.

assertions.trap: Play/Pause and Heart icons swap instantly with no animation, and the modal spring uses `bounce: 0.25`
assertions.description: Contextual icon swaps animate with the exact values opacity 0->1, scale 0.25->1, blur 4px->0px, transition { type: 'spring', duration: 0.3, bounce: 0 }. Since motion is in package.json, use the Motion approach; bounce must be 0 everywhere (the modal's bounce: 0.25 must become 0).

assertions.trap: RootLayout `<html>` (macOS target) has no `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased` / `antialiased` class
assertions.description: Apply -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased (Tailwind `antialiased`) once at the root layout (html/body) for crisper macOS text.

assertions.trap: `{liveCount} viewers` is a live-updating number rendered with default numerals
assertions.description: Dynamically updating numbers (the live viewer count) use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums (Tailwind `tabular-nums`) to prevent layout shift.

assertions.trap: The `<h1>` heading has no text-wrap rule
assertions.description: Headings use text-wrap: balance (Tailwind `text-balance`) for even line distribution.

assertions.trap:
The `

` description paragraph has no text-wrap rule
assertions.description: Short-to-medium body text uses text-wrap: pretty (Tailwind `text-pretty`) to avoid orphaned last-line words.

assertions.trap: The avatar img uses a tinted `outline-slate-700/20` outline and no dark-mode variant
assertions.description: Image outlines must be a neutral 1px low-opacity outline: pure black `outline-black/10` in light mode and pure white `dark:outline-white/10` in dark mode, with `-outline-offset-1`. Never a tinted neutral like slate/zinc.

assertions.trap: The like button uses `active:scale-[0.9]` — below the 0.95 floor
assertions.description: Scale on press must be exactly scale(0.96); never below 0.95 (the 0.9 must be raised to 0.96).

assertions.trap: AnimatePresence wraps default-state content (icons/list) without `initial={false}`, so it animates on first page load
assertions.description: AnimatePresence for elements already in their default state on mount uses `initial={false}` so they don't animate in on page load, only on subsequent state changes.

assertions.trap: Outer div has inline `transition: 'all 200ms ease-out'` and the play button uses Tailwind `transition` (which maps to transition-property: all)
assertions.description: Never use `transition: all` or bare Tailwind `transition`. Specify exact properties (e.g. transition-[box-shadow] or transition-transform).
will-change must be specific (transform / opacity / filter) and only added for observed first-frame stutter — never `will-change: all`. Here it should be removed or scoped to transform.

assertions.trap: Play button is `size-6` (24px) and the like button is 24x24px — both below the 40px minimum with no expanded hit area
assertions.description: Interactive elements need at least a 40x40px hit area; small visible controls extend it with a pseudo-element (e.g. after:size-10 after:-translate-1/2), without overlapping neighbors.
